productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adipower Barricade Black Sports Shoes
description: With these adidas adiPower Barricade shoes, aggression, dominance and performance will come naturally to you. Whether it's capoeira, soccer or karate, these adidas shoes give you a natural feel for fast sweeps and swift strikes.UpperPerforated synthetic upper for dry comfort and durabilityComfortable textile liningLace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes logoPadded collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfortMidsoleFoam midsole at the heel of the shoeOutsoleAggressive herringbone grooves on the TPU outsoleShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
